project.name: Indian Election Model
project.description: A constituency-level analysis engine for 2019 and 2024 Indian Lok Sabha elections. Research pipeline turning ECI raw data into tidy CSVs, derived features, comparative analyses, and swing simulations.

nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: Central configuration module defining ACTIVE_YEAR, filesystem paths (RAW_DIR, PROCESSED_DIR, DATABASE_DIR), year-stamped schema constants like ALLIANCE_COL, and analysis tuning knobs such as CLOSE_MARGIN_THRESHOLD.

nodes.name: data_io.py
nodes.summary: Canonical I/O layer exposing year-stamped filenames and load/save helpers for processed CSVs, outputs, and database tables; all paths derive from config.ACTIVE_YEAR.

nodes.name: seat_flip_report.py
nodes.summary: Compares actual election winners against zero-sum swing simulation winners per constituency and writes a seat-flip report with party-change flags.

nodes.name: state_swing_sensitivity.py
nodes.summary: Aggregates per-state swing sensitivity metrics—flip rates, close-seat counts, and margin statistics—by merging actual results with zero-sum simulation output.

nodes.name: clean_eci.py
nodes.summary: Year-agnostic ECI Excel cleaner using calamine engine: auto-detects header rows, normalises columns, computes rank/vote_share/margin, and routes files to canonical processed CSVs.

nodes.name: clean_eci_2019.py
nodes.summary: Legacy sibling of clean_eci targeting the same modern ECI format but keyed on ELECTION_YEAR; parses raw Excel into standardised candidate, party, and summary CSVs.

nodes.name: database_layer.py
nodes.summary: Builds year-stamped analytical database tables (results, candidate, party, alliance, constituency) from processed CSVs with stable constituency_id slugs for cross-year joins.

nodes.name: query_database.py
nodes.summary: Convenience query module over database tables: closest wins, fragmentation, seat counts, vulnerable seats, and alliance seat totals.

nodes.name: build_state_demographics_2011.py
nodes.summary: Placeholder Census 2011 demographics builder that audits uploaded files against the census manifest; parsing not yet implemented.

nodes.name: census_manifest.py
nodes.summary: Curated checklist of Census 2011 tables needed for electoral analysis, with helpers to derive expected filenames and locate uploaded files.

nodes.name: build_party_alliances.py
nodes.summary: Builds cross-year party-to-alliance lookup table from party_master and hardcoded PARTY_ALLIANCE_MAP for 2019 and 2024.

nodes.name: build_party_metadata.py
nodes.summary: Enriches contesting parties with type, ideology, region, and year-specific alliance tags; outputs party counts audit and full metadata CSV.

nodes.name: normalise_candidates.py
nodes.summary: Normalises candidate names and assigns stable candidate_election_id keys to results_table rows; maintains cross-year candidate_master roster.

nodes.name: normalise_parties.py
nodes.summary: Maps raw ECI party strings to canonical party_id via alias table; augments results_table and writes party_master.csv.

nodes.name: simple_swing_simulator.py
nodes.summary: Applies uniform per-party vote-share swings nationwide, re-ranks candidates, and outputs simulated winners (non-zero-sum model).

nodes.name: state_swing_simulator.py
nodes.summary: Applies (state, party) keyed swings to vote shares, re-ranks per constituency, and outputs state-level simulated winners (non-zero-sum).

nodes.name: zero_sum_state_swing_simulator.py
nodes.summary: Per-(state, party) swing simulator that clips negative shares and renormalises each constituency to 100%, producing rigorous flip comparisons for analysis modules.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Loads actual and simulated winners, merges on state/constituency, flags flipped seats, saves report, and prints summary statistics.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Computes per-state flip rates and close-seat counts using CLOSE_MARGIN_THRESHOLD, saves state swing sensitivity CSV.

nodes.name: clean_col
nodes.summary: Normalises Excel column headers to snake_case alphanumeric identifiers.

nodes.name: detect_header_row
nodes.summary: Scans raw sheet rows to find the first row matching header heuristics (non-null ratio, string cells, keyword match).

nodes.name: load_excel_file
nodes.summary: Reads an ECI Excel file with calamine engine, detects header row, and returns cleaned DataFrame.

nodes.name: remove_junk_rows
nodes.summary: Drops entirely empty rows from a DataFrame while preserving total/summary rows.

nodes.name: standardize_results
nodes.summary: Transforms candidate-level sheet into canonical long table with rank, vote_share, winner flag, and margin_votes.

nodes.name: standardize_party_file
nodes.summary: Cleans party reference sheet: strips whitespace on text columns and stamps ACTIVE_YEAR.

nodes.name: standardize_summary_file
nodes.summary: Basic cleaning for constituency summary sheet (placeholder for full multi-sheet loader).

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Iterates RAW_YEAR_DIR Excel files, routes each to appropriate standardiser, and saves via data_io.save_csv.

nodes.name: clean_col
nodes.summary: Normalises Excel column headers to snake_case alphanumeric identifiers.

nodes.name: detect_header_row
nodes.summary: Scans raw sheet rows to find the first row matching header heuristics.

nodes.name: load_excel_file
nodes.summary: Reads ECI Excel with calamine, auto-detects header, returns normalised DataFrame.

nodes.name: remove_junk_rows
nodes.summary: Drops entirely empty rows from a DataFrame.

nodes.name: standardize_results
nodes.summary: Builds canonical candidate results with rank, vote_share, winner, and margin_votes using ELECTION_YEAR.

nodes.name: standardize_party_file
nodes.summary: Cleans party sheet and stamps ELECTION_YEAR.

nodes.name: standardize_summary_file
nodes.summary: Basic cleaning for constituency summary sheet.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Processes all Excel files in RAW_YEAR_DIR and writes year-stamped processed CSVs.

nodes.name: load_candidate_results
nodes.summary: Reads the year-stamped ECI candidate results CSV from PROCESSED_DIR.

nodes.name: load_party_metadata
nodes.summary: Reads party metadata CSV with type, alliance, ideology, and region.

nodes.name: load_winners
nodes.summary: Reads one-row-per-constituency winners table enriched with party metadata.

nodes.name: load_constituency_features
nodes.summary: Reads constituency-level numeric features for modelling.

nodes.name: save_csv
nodes.summary: Writes DataFrame to processed/ or outputs/ directory based on outputs flag.

nodes.name: save_parquet
nodes.summary: Writes DataFrame as Parquet to processed/ or outputs/.

nodes.name: save_table
nodes.summary: Persists database table as both CSV and Parquet with ACTIVE_YEAR suffix.

nodes.name: load_table
nodes.summary: Loads a year-stamped database table from Parquet.

nodes.name: make_constituency_id
nodes.summary: Creates year-stable slug IDs like STATE__CONSTITUENCY for cross-year joins.

nodes.name: load_data
nodes.summary: Loads results, party metadata, winners, and constituency features via data_io.

nodes.name: build_results_table
nodes.summary: Builds long candidate-level fact table with election_year, election_type, and constituency_id.

nodes.name: build_party_table
nodes.summary: Extracts one row per party with metadata columns including year-stamped alliance.

nodes.name: build_constituency_table
nodes.summary: Combines constituency features with stable id and winner facts.

nodes.name: build_alliance_table
nodes.summary: Produces long-format (election_year, party, alliance) mapping.

nodes.name: build_candidate_table
nodes.summary: Creates lightweight candidate lookup keyed by candidate_id slug.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Loads data, builds all five database tables, and saves via save_table.

nodes.name: closest_wins
nodes.summary: Returns constituencies with smallest top-2 margin, optionally filtered by winning party.

nodes.name: most_fragmented
nodes.summary: Returns constituencies with highest effective number of parties.

nodes.name: seats_by_state_and_party
nodes.summary: Aggregates seat counts grouped by state and party from results_table.

nodes.name: vulnerable_seats
nodes.summary: Lists seats held by a party whose margin is below threshold.

nodes.name: alliance_seat_counts
nodes.summary: Counts seats by year-stamped alliance column from constituency_table.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Demo entry point printing sample queries for BJP closest wins, fragmentation, vulnerable INC seats, and alliance counts.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Audits CENSUS_2011_DIR against manifest entries, reports present/missing/extra files; parsing deferred.

nodes.name: expected_basename
nodes.summary: Returns preferred filename for a manifest entry given optional extension.

nodes.name: find_uploaded_file
nodes.summary: Locates uploaded Census file matching preferred basename or code prefix in raw directory.

nodes.name: tables_by_priority
nodes.summary: Filters CENSUS_2011_TABLES list by priority level or returns all.

nodes.name: load_party_master
nodes.summary: Reads party_master.csv from DATABASE_DIR or raises if missing.

nodes.name: build_party_alliance_table
nodes.summary: Expands PARTY_ALLIANCE_MAP into long (party_id, election_year, alliance) rows for all known parties.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Builds and saves party_alliance_by_year.csv with summary stats and UNKNOWN audit.

nodes.name: build_party_counts
nodes.summary: Counts candidates per party from results DataFrame.

nodes.name: build_party_metadata
nodes.summary: Merges PARTY_FACTS and PARTY_ALLIANCE_MAP onto party counts with unknown defaults.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Loads candidate results, builds counts and metadata tables, saves both CSVs.

nodes.name: clean_text
nodes.summary: Uppercases and normalises candidate name strings, stripping special characters.

nodes.name: slugify
nodes.summary: Converts cleaned text to underscore slug for ID components.

nodes.name: build_candidate_election_id
nodes.summary: Constructs stable CAND_<year>_<state>_<constituency>_<party>_<name> identifier.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Augments results_table with candidate IDs, updates candidate_master cross-year roster.

nodes.name: clean_text
nodes.summary: Uppercases and normalises raw party name strings.

nodes.name: slugify
nodes.summary: Converts cleaned party text to underscore slug.

nodes.name: normalise_party
nodes.summary: Maps raw party via KNOWN_PARTY_ALIASES or generates PARTY_ slug for unknowns.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Adds party_id columns to results_table and writes party_master.csv.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Applies SWINGS dict to vote_share, re-ranks per constituency, saves simulated winners CSV.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Applies STATE_SWINGS keyed by (state, party), re-ranks, saves state simulated winners.

nodes.name: apply_zero_sum_swing
nodes.summary: Within one constituency group, applies state-party swing, clips to zero, renormalises shares to 100%.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Runs zero-sum swing per constituency, saves full simulated results and winners, reports changed seats.

nodes.name: constituency_similarity.py
nodes.summary: Nearest-neighbour analysis over constituency feature vectors using sklearn to find the k most similar constituencies by winner vote share, top-2 margin, effective number of parties, and margin votes.

nodes.name: build_similarity
nodes.summary: Standardises four constituency feature columns, fits a NearestNeighbors index, and returns a table of each constituency's k closest neighbours with distances.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Loads constituency features, builds the neighbour table, saves it to CSV, and prints example neighbours for sanity-checking.

nodes.name: vote_seat_distortion.py
nodes.summary: Compares each party's national vote share against its seat share under FPTP and reports the representation gap (over- or under-representation).

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Loads candidate results and winners, computes vote-seat distortion metrics, saves the output, and prints top over- and under-represented parties.

nodes.name: build_constituency_features.py
nodes.summary: Builds the per-constituency feature table by joining winner metadata with effective number of parties and top-2 margin metrics for downstream analysis and ML.

nodes.name: build_features
nodes.summary: Aggregates ENP and top-2 margins from candidate results, merges them with winner-side fields, renames columns, and writes the constituency features CSV.

nodes.name: build_constituency_top2.py
nodes.summary: Filters candidate results to the top-two ranked candidates per constituency for margin and two-horse-race analyses.

nodes.name: build_top2
nodes.summary: Sorts results by rank within each constituency, keeps the top two rows per group, and saves the filtered table.

nodes.name: build_winners_table.py
nodes.summary: Builds the foundational one-row-per-constituency winners lookup enriched with party metadata (alliance, ideology, region) for analysis and simulation layers.

nodes.name: build_winners
nodes.summary: Filters winning candidates, joins party metadata, validates winner counts and uniqueness, saves the winners table, and prints seat summaries.

nodes.name: election_metrics.py
nodes.summary: Centralises reusable election formulas (ENP, vote share, top-2 margin, seat counts, vote-seat distortion) so all project layers compute identical metrics.

nodes.name: effective_number_of_parties
nodes.summary: Computes the Laakso-Taagepera effective number of parties (ENP = 1 / sum(p_i^2)) from percentage-form vote shares.

nodes.name: calculate_vote_share
nodes.summary: Adds a vote_share column as each row's vote count divided by the group total, expressed as a percentage.

nodes.name: calculate_top2_margin
nodes.summary: For each constituency group, returns the vote-share gap between the first- and second-ranked candidates as top2_margin_pct.

nodes.name: calculate_seat_counts
nodes.summary: Counts seats per party or alliance from a winners table and returns a sorted seat-count DataFrame.

nodes.name: calculate_vote_seat_distortion
nodes.summary: Merges national vote share and seat share per party and computes representation_gap (seat_share minus vote_share) to measure FPTP distortion.

nodes.name: validation.py
nodes.summary: Lightweight sanity checks for intermediate election tables — missing columns, duplicate winners, expected seat counts, and vote-share bounds.

nodes.name: check_expected_winners
nodes.summary: Verifies the winners table contains exactly 543 Lok Sabha constituencies and prints an OK or WARN status line.

nodes.name: check_required_columns
nodes.summary: Raises KeyError if any required column is missing from a DataFrame, preventing confusing downstream KeyErrors.

nodes.name: check_no_duplicate_winners
nodes.summary: Checks that each (state, constituency) pair maps to exactly one winning row and reports duplicate counts.

nodes.name: check_vote_share_bounds
nodes.summary: Asserts vote_share values stay within the 0–100 range to catch sign or normalisation bugs.

nodes.name: print_basic_dataset_summary
nodes.summary: Prints a one-shot human-readable summary of a DataFrame's shape, columns, and null counts for notebook debugging.

nodes.name: audit_demographic_coverage.py
nodes.summary: Scans demographic raw and processed folders against the catalog master CSV and reports which variables have matching files and populated columns.

nodes.name: list_raw_files
nodes.summary: Recursively collects data files with supported extensions under given root directories.

nodes.name: raw_roots_for_source
nodes.summary: Resolves warehouse raw subdirectories and legacy Census paths for a catalog source id.

nodes.name: match_raw_file
nodes.summary: Finds a raw file whose basename contains the expected catalog substring.

nodes.name: list_processed_files
nodes.summary: Lists CSV and parquet files in the demographics processed directory.

nodes.name: processed_column_ready
nodes.summary: Checks whether a catalog column exists with non-null values in master or dedicated processed files.

nodes.name: audit_variables
nodes.summary: Enriches the variables dataframe with raw match flags, processed availability, and coverage status.

nodes.name: print_summary
nodes.summary: Prints coverage totals grouped by source and lists variables awaiting processing.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point orchestrating the script workflow.

nodes.name: build_demographic_catalog.py
nodes.summary: Exports in-code demographic variable and source definitions to CSV files under the demographics catalog directory.

nodes.name: ensure_folders
nodes.summary: Creates the demographic warehouse directory tree if missing.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point orchestrating the script workflow.

nodes.name: build_state_demographic_master.py
nodes.summary: Creates an empty header-only state_demographics_master.csv template using the canonical column schema from the catalog.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point orchestrating the script workflow.

nodes.name: clean_census_district_2011.py
nodes.summary: Cleans Census 2011 district PCA population data, rolls up post-2011 states (Telangana, Ladakh), and merges PCA metrics into the state master.

nodes.name: clean_name
nodes.summary: Normalizes geographic names to uppercase stripped strings.

nodes.name: find_raw_file
nodes.summary: Locates the district population workbook under legacy Census folders.

nodes.name: ratio
nodes.summary: Computes safe percentage ratios from numeric numerator and denominator series.

nodes.name: load_pca
nodes.summary: Reads the district PCA Excel sheet using the calamine engine.

nodes.name: build_district_table
nodes.summary: Transforms raw district PCA rows into a cleaned district-level demographics dataframe.

nodes.name: assign_post_2011_state
nodes.summary: Maps 2011 districts to post-partition state labels for Telangana and Ladakh.

nodes.name: aggregate_group
nodes.summary: Aggregates district metrics into population-weighted state-level totals for one state group.

nodes.name: build_state_from_districts
nodes.summary: Groups districts by post-2011 state and applies aggregate_group to build state rollups.

nodes.name: update_state_master
nodes.summary: Merges cleaned Census or district metrics into state_demographics_master.csv without inventing values.

nodes.name: print_validation
nodes.summary: Prints row counts, missing-value summaries, and sample output rows.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point orchestrating the script workflow.

nodes.name: clean_census_state_2011.py
nodes.summary: Parses Census 2011 state-level population, religion, and PCA age workbooks into a unified state demographics table and updates the master CSV.

nodes.name: _raw_search_roots
nodes.summary: Returns existing demographic raw and legacy Census search roots.

nodes.name: find_file
nodes.summary: Finds the first raw file under search roots whose name contains a pattern.

nodes.name: clean_state_name
nodes.summary: Normalizes Census state labels for cross-table merging.

nodes.name: safe_read_excel
nodes.summary: Reads Excel via calamine and returns None with a warning on failure.

nodes.name: standardize_columns
nodes.summary: Lowercases and snake_cases dataframe column names.

nodes.name: _find_column
nodes.summary: Selects the first column whose normalized name matches keyword constraints.

nodes.name: _to_numeric
nodes.summary: Coerces a series to numeric after stripping comma separators.

nodes.name: _warn_missing
nodes.summary: Prints a standardized warning for missing inputs or columns.

nodes.name: _diagnose_df
nodes.summary: Prints debug shape, columns, and sample rows for a dataframe.

nodes.name: clean_population_file
nodes.summary: Extracts state population, urban/rural share, literacy, SC/ST, and sex ratio from the PCA population workbook.

nodes.name: clean_religion_file
nodes.summary: Parses Census C-01 religion counts into state-level religious percentage columns.

nodes.name: _clean_religion_wide_fallback
nodes.summary: Fallback parser for wide-format religion tables when C-01 layout detection fails.

nodes.name: clean_pca_age_file
nodes.summary: Extracts youth share and optional SC/ST cross-check from the PCA age workbook.

nodes.name: merge_census_tables
nodes.summary: Outer-merges population, religion, and PCA tables on state with SC/ST coalescing.

nodes.name: save_output
nodes.summary: Writes the merged Census state demographics CSV to the processed directory.

nodes.name: update_state_master
nodes.summary: Merges cleaned Census or district metrics into state_demographics_master.csv without inventing values.

nodes.name: print_validation
nodes.summary: Prints row counts, missing-value summaries, and sample output rows.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point orchestrating the script workflow.

nodes.name: demographic_catalog.py
nodes.summary: Single source of truth listing desired demographic variables, data sources, raw-file hints, processed column names, and the state master schema.

nodes.name: merge_nfhs.py
nodes.summary: Placeholder NFHS merge script that checks for raw/processed NFHS files and reports readiness without writing synthetic values.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point orchestrating the script workflow.

nodes.name: build_nfhs_district_features.py
nodes.summary: CLI pipeline that builds district-level NFHS-4/NFHS-5 demographic features by resolving district from microdata columns or joining household records to DHS geographic shapefiles via cluster IDs.

nodes.name: load_ge_lookup
nodes.summary: Loads DHS geographic shapefiles (IAGE71FL/IAGE7AFL) and returns a cluster-to-district lookup DataFrame with state and urban/rural attributes.

nodes.name: attach_district_from_ge
nodes.summary: Joins household microdata to the GE lookup on cluster ID, validates match rate (>=50%), and returns joined records or diagnostic candidates when join fails.

nodes.name: aggregate_district_frame
nodes.summary: Groups joined household records by state and district, computing weighted NFHS indicators (electricity, sanitation, LPG, wealth) for each district.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Orchestrates NFHS-4 and NFHS-5 district feature builds across microdata and GE-join paths, merges IR features when available, and writes nfhs_district_features.csv.

nodes.name: build_nfhs_state_features.py
nodes.summary: CLI pipeline that aggregates NFHS-4 and NFHS-5 household, women, men, and person-count microdata into state-level feature tables with NFHS-4-to-5 trend columns.

nodes.name: build_survey_features
nodes.summary: Resolves HR/IR/PR/MR Stata files for a survey version, aggregates features per state, merges datasets, and attaches survey metadata and state labels.

nodes.name: add_trends
nodes.summary: Computes NFHS-4-to-NFHS-5 delta columns for internet, electricity, sanitation, and fertility by joining survey rounds on state.

nodes.name: print_validation
nodes.summary: Prints coverage statistics, per-feature missingness rates, and Stata variable-to-feature mapping diagnostics after state feature build.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Builds NFHS-4 and NFHS-5 state features, adds trend columns, writes nfhs_state_features.csv, and prints validation output.

nodes.name: extract_dhs_zips.py
nodes.summary: Extracts Stata (.dta) microdata files from DHS DT-format zip archives listed in the download inventory into the DHS extracted directory.

nodes.name: extract_stata_from_zip
nodes.summary: Opens a DHS zip archive and extracts .dta members to the output directory, skipping files that already exist.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Iterates DT-format files from the DHS inventory and extracts all Stata microdata to DHS_EXTRACTED_DIR.

nodes.name: feature_utils.py
nodes.summary: Shared library for weighted NFHS aggregation from Stata microdata, including column resolution, indicator specs, TFR estimation, and HH/IR/MR/PR feature builders.
nodes.languageNotes: Defines HH_INDICATOR_SPECS, IR_SPECS, and MR_SPECS dicts mapping output feature names to Stata variable candidates and keyword fallbacks.

nodes.name: load_inventory
nodes.summary: Loads the DHS file inventory from candidate CSV paths, optionally enriching with parsed filename metadata.

nodes.name: find_column
nodes.summary: Resolves a Stata column by exact name match first, then by keyword search against variable labels in metadata.

nodes.name: weighted_pct
nodes.summary: Computes a survey-weighted percentage of values matching a yes-code set, returning NaN when no valid weights exist.

nodes.name: resolve_dta_path
nodes.summary: Locates an extracted Stata file by stem, trying exact, uppercase, and glob matches across .dta/.DTA extensions.

nodes.name: compute_tfr
nodes.summary: Estimates total fertility rate from birth-history columns using age-specific fertility rates, falling back to weighted mean children ever born.

nodes.name: derive_hh_indicators
nodes.summary: Derives boolean household indicator columns for improved sanitation and LPG cooking fuel from raw Stata toilet and fuel variables.

nodes.name: aggregate_hh_features
nodes.summary: Reads household recode (HR) microdata, groups by specified columns, and computes weighted HH_INDICATOR_SPECS features per group.

nodes.name: aggregate_ir_features
nodes.summary: Aggregates women's individual recode (IR) microdata into literacy, education, and fertility features per group using IR_SPECS.

nodes.name: aggregate_mr_features
nodes.summary: Aggregates men's individual recode (MR) microdata into male literacy percentage per group, returning empty when state/weight columns are missing.

nodes.name: count_persons
nodes.summary: Counts persons per group from population recode (PR) microdata using groupby size.

nodes.name: inspect_dhs_variables.py
nodes.summary: Inspects all extracted DHS Stata files and writes a CSV feature dictionary mapping variables to labels and sample value codes.

nodes.name: inspect_dta
nodes.summary: Reads Stata metadata only and returns a list of variable records with labels and sample value-label mappings.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Scans all .dta files in DHS_EXTRACTED_DIR, inspects each, and saves the combined variable dictionary to dhs_feature_dictionary.csv.

nodes.name: paths.py
nodes.summary: Centralizes DHS/NFHS pipeline paths, survey version metadata, national fileset stems, feature column schemas, and GE shapefile identifiers.

nodes.name: audit_dhs_downloads.py
nodes.summary: Deprecated compatibility shim that re-exports the DHS download audit CLI from src.demographics.dhs.audit_dhs_downloads so older module paths keep working.
nodes.languageNotes: Thin __main__ wrapper delegating to the canonical dhs subpackage implementation.

nodes.name: audit_dhs_downloads.py
nodes.summary: Audits DHS and NFHS microdata zip archives in data/raw/dhs_downloads/, parsing filenames and inspecting inner data files to produce inventory and audit CSV reports.

nodes.name: build_dhs_geospatial_layer.py
nodes.summary: Extracts India national GE shapefiles from DHS zips, builds a cluster-level geospatial CSV, and exports a privacy-safe public map dataset with anonymized cluster IDs and rounded coordinates.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses pyshp shapefile.Reader and SHA-256 hashing to anonymize cluster identifiers before public export.

nodes.name: filename_parser.py
nodes.summary: Package-local re-export barrel exposing DHS filename parsing utilities from src.demographics.dhs_filename_parser for use within the dhs subpackage.

nodes.name: dhs_filename_parser.py
nodes.summary: Parses DHS Program distribution zip basenames ([CC][DD][VV][FF]) into structured metadata including Indian state codes, dataset types, NFHS survey versions, and file formats.
nodes.languageNotes: Frozen dataclass DhsFilenameInfo and lookup tables for India geo codes, dataset types, and NFHS version labels.

nodes.name: _list_zip_members
nodes.summary: Opens a zip archive and returns a comma-separated list of inner data files (.dta, .dat, .sav, shapefile components), or an error message for bad archives.

nodes.name: audit_download
nodes.summary: Builds an audit record for a single DHS download by combining filename parsing, zip member inspection, file size, and download completeness status.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point that scans all zip and partial downloads in DHS_DOWNLOADS_DIR and writes audit and inventory CSVs to demographics outputs.

nodes.name: extract_ge_shapefile
nodes.summary: Extracts shapefile components from a GE zip into DHS_EXTRACTED_DIR, skipping re-extraction when the target .shp already exists.

nodes.name: anonymize_cluster_id
nodes.summary: Derives a 12-character SHA-256 digest from survey and cluster ID for privacy-safe public geospatial exports.

nodes.name: build_from_shapefile
nodes.summary: Reads a DHS GE shapefile and converts cluster records with valid lat/lon into a normalized DataFrame with state, district, and urban/rural fields.

nodes.name: export_public
nodes.summary: Produces a public-safe geospatial subset by anonymizing cluster IDs, rounding coordinates to two decimals, and dropping sensitive columns.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point that discovers IAGE*.zip GE archives, extracts shapefiles, concatenates cluster rows, and writes internal and public geospatial CSV outputs.

nodes.name: DhsFilenameInfo
nodes.summary: Immutable dataclass holding parsed DHS filename fields including geo code, dataset type, survey label, file format, and parse status metadata.

nodes.name: _describe_dhs_phase
nodes.summary: Maps a two-character DHS version code to a human-readable phase and release label such as DHS-VII release 1.

nodes.name: describe_survey
nodes.summary: Returns a human-readable survey label for India NFHS/DHS files, preferring known NFHS version codes over generic DHS phase descriptions.

nodes.name: parse_dhs_filename
nodes.summary: Parses a DHS distribution zip basename against the [CC][DD][VV][FF] pattern and returns a DhsFilenameInfo with state, dataset type, survey, and format metadata.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documents how to build the election/demographics data bundle, serve the static visualizer locally, and upgrade from a state grid cartogram to real GeoJSON boundaries.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Static HTML shell for the India election and demographics visualizer with header state selector, sidebar metric/DHS/coverage controls, state grid or table view, and detail panels for districts, party swings, and constituencies.
nodes.languageNotes: Defines DOM mount points (mapGrid, districtTable, dhsMap, etc.) consumed by app.js; links styles.css and loads app.js at page end.

nodes.name: styles.css
nodes.summary: CSS design system and layout for the visualizer including CSS custom properties, sticky header, sidebar/workspace grid, state cartogram tiles, data tables, DHS cluster map styling, and a 980px responsive breakpoint.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses CSS variables for theming and defines classes (.state-tile, .dhs-map, .legend-ramp) that app.js applies when rendering dynamic content.

nodes.name: PROJECT_GUIDE.md
nodes.summary: Onboarding guide for the Lok Sabha research pipeline: current capabilities, pipeline commands, key output CSVs, column glossary, and recommended next milestones toward state-first analysis.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Top-level project README describing the Indian Election Model architecture, install steps, full pipeline run order, demographic warehouse workflow, visual explorer setup, and planned analyses.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Demographic data warehouse guide covering catalog-first Census/NFHS ingestion, folder layout, cleaner commands, geography caveats, and priority next data files.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: DHS/NFHS microdata pipeline documentation with privacy rules, CLI commands, output file catalog, and visualizer integration for anonymized cluster maps.

nodes.name: requirements.txt
nodes.summary: Python dependency manifest for the research pipeline: pandas/numpy data stack, Excel readers, pyarrow parquet, scikit-learn, Jupyter, pyreadstat for DHS Stata files, and pyshp for geospatial extraction.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty root package marker enabling `python -m src.*` module execution.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty analysis subpackage initializer.

nodes.name: build_constituency_volatality.py
nodes.summary: Builds constituency_volatility_2019_2024.csv by merging winner comparison, party swing aggregates, and 2024 constituency features into a composite volatility score.

nodes.name: load_data
nodes.summary: Reads winner comparison CSV, party swings CSV, and 2024 constituency features parquet.

nodes.name: build_party_swing_features
nodes.summary: Aggregates per-constituency max/min/average absolute party swings and swing range.

nodes.name: build_volatility_table
nodes.summary: Merges comparison, swing, and feature columns then computes flip, margin, fragmentation, and composite volatility scores.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point writing constituency_volatility_2019_2024.csv and printing top volatile seats.

nodes.name: build_state_election_demographic_analysis.py
nodes.summary: State-level bridge script joining Lok Sabha 2019/2024 outcomes, volatility, party swings, and Census demographics with explicit geography match status tags.

nodes.name: normalise_state_name
nodes.summary: Normalises state names for Census/ECI key matching with uppercase and ampersand handling.

nodes.name: load_inputs
nodes.summary: Loads winner comparison, volatility, party swings, alliance map, and state demographics master CSVs.

nodes.name: weighted_average
nodes.summary: Population-weighted mean helper for composite demographic rows.

nodes.name: build_demographic_lookup
nodes.summary: Builds state-keyed demographic lookup with composite UT rows and legacy 2011 geography aliases.

nodes.name: add_alliance_columns
nodes.summary: Joins 2019/2024 alliance labels onto winner rows and flags alliance flips.

nodes.name: most_common
nodes.summary: Returns the modal value from a pandas Series for leading party/alliance aggregation.

nodes.name: build_state_outcomes
nodes.summary: Aggregates seat flips, BJP/INC seat changes, volatility metrics, and flip rates per state.

nodes.name: build_state_party_swings
nodes.summary: Builds per-state party swing table with seat counts and 2024 alliance labels.

nodes.name: add_key_party_swing_columns
nodes.summary: Pivots BJP and INC average swings onto the state outcomes table.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point writing state_election_demographic_analysis.csv and state_party_swing_analysis.csv.

nodes.name: compare_2019_2024.py
nodes.summary: Cross-year historical comparison: reconciles renamed constituencies via alias map, builds winner comparison, party swing tables, and unmatched constituency audit.

nodes.name: load_results
nodes.summary: Loads 2019 and 2024 results_table parquet files from data/database.

nodes.name: add_comparison_key
nodes.summary: Applies CONSTITUENCY_ID_ALIASES map to align cross-year constituency_id keys.

nodes.name: build_unmatched_constituencies
nodes.summary: Identifies winner rows with no cross-year constituency match for audit output.

nodes.name: build_winner_comparison
nodes.summary: Inner-joins 2019 and 2024 winners on reconciled constituency_id and flags seat_flipped.

nodes.name: build_party_swing_table
nodes.summary: Outer-joins party vote shares by constituency/party and computes swing as 2024 minus 2019.

nodes.name: build_state_swing_summary
nodes.summary: Averages party swings by state and party_id for summary CSV.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI orchestrator saving winner comparison, party swings, state summary, and unmatched audit CSVs.

nodes.name: election_simulator_v1.py
nodes.summary: Full scenario simulator v1: loads editable state/party swings, applies zero-sum renormalisation per constituency, and writes projections, flip reports, and battleground rankings.

nodes.name: load_state_party_swings
nodes.summary: Parses and validates scenario CSV into a (state, party_id) to swing lookup dict.

nodes.name: apply_zero_sum_swing
nodes.summary: Applies per-party swings within a constituency group and renormalises simulated vote shares to 100%.

nodes.name: load_data
nodes.summary: Loads 2024 results, alliance map, optional volatility table, and scenario swings.

nodes.name: add_alliances
nodes.summary: Joins BASE_YEAR alliance labels onto results rows.

nodes.name: simulate
nodes.summary: Group-applies zero-sum swing across all constituencies and extracts simulated winners.

nodes.name: build_actual_winners
nodes.summary: Extracts actual 2024 winner rows with renamed columns for flip comparison.

nodes.name: build_flip_report
nodes.summary: Merges actual and simulated winners and flags flipped seats.

nodes.name: build_national_projection
nodes.summary: Counts simulated seats by party and alliance nationally.

nodes.name: build_state_projection
nodes.summary: Counts simulated seats by state and party.

nodes.name: build_battlegrounds
nodes.summary: Enriches flip report with volatility features and sorts battleground seats.

nodes.name: save_outputs
nodes.summary: Writes full simulation CSVs including results, winners, projections, and battlegrounds.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point running the full v1 scenario simulator and printing projection summary.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty utils subpackage initializer.

nodes.name: build_visualizer_data.py
nodes.summary: ETL script assembling a relational JSON bundle (states, districts, party swings, constituencies) for the static visualizer with grid positions and field catalog metadata.

nodes.name: clean_json_value
nodes.summary: Sanitises pandas/numpy values for JSON serialisation (NaN to null).

nodes.name: records
nodes.summary: Converts a DataFrame to a list of JSON-safe dict records.

nodes.name: name_key
nodes.summary: Normalises geographic names to uppercase keys with alias mapping.

nodes.name: canonical_state_for_district
nodes.summary: Maps 2011 district rows to 2024 election states including Telangana and Ladakh splits.

nodes.name: add_state_grid
nodes.summary: Adds cartogram grid_row/grid_col coordinates from STATE_GRID_POSITIONS lookup.

nodes.name: build_field_catalog
nodes.summary: Builds visualizer field metadata with labels, groups, and coverage counts.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point writing visualizer/data/election_demographics_bundle.json.

nodes.name: app.js
nodes.summary: Browser-side election and demographics explorer: state grid cartogram, metric choropleth coloring, district/party/constituency drilldown tables, and optional DHS cluster scatter overlay.

nodes.name: colorFor
nodes.summary: Maps a numeric metric value to an RGB choropleth color on a three-stop green ramp.

nodes.name: initControls
nodes.summary: Populates metric/state/sort controls and wires UI event listeners.

nodes.name: renderLegend
nodes.summary: Renders the selected metric legend with min/max formatted values.

nodes.name: renderMap
nodes.summary: Renders state grid tiles and sortable state summary table colored by selected metric.

nodes.name: renderStateSummary
nodes.summary: Displays metric cards and election/demography signal rows for the selected state.

nodes.name: renderCoverage
nodes.summary: Shows field availability bars from the bundle field catalog.

nodes.name: renderTable
nodes.summary: Generic HTML table renderer with formatted values and row limits.

nodes.name: renderDistricts
nodes.summary: Filters and sorts district demographics for the selected state.

nodes.name: renderParties
nodes.summary: Shows state party swing table filtered by minimum seat threshold.

nodes.name: renderConstituencies
nodes.summary: Lists constituencies with flip/close filters sorted by volatility score.

nodes.name: renderDhsMap
nodes.summary: Renders SVG scatter map of anonymized DHS cluster points with tooltips.

nodes.name: render
nodes.summary: Top-level render orchestrator refreshing all dashboard panels.

nodes.name: loadDhsClusters
nodes.summary: Fetches and parses the public DHS geospatial CSV layer.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Async bootstrap: loads JSON bundle, initializes controls, and renders the dashboard.

layers.name: Core Configuration & I/O
layers.description: Central paths, election constants, and CSV/Parquet load/save helpers used by every pipeline stage.

layers.name: Data Cleaning
layers.description: Transforms raw ECI Excel dumps into tidy candidate/party/summary CSVs.

layers.name: Database Layer
layers.description: Builds and queries normalised analytical tables (candidates, constituencies, alliances).

layers.name: Metadata & Normalisation
layers.description: Party metadata, alliance tables, and candidate/party name normalisation.

layers.name: Feature Engineering
layers.description: Derives constituency-level features, winners, and top-2 tables from cleaned results.

layers.name: Demographics
layers.description: Census 2011, NFHS/DHS microdata extraction, and state/district demographic features.

layers.name: Analysis
layers.description: Cross-year comparisons, vote-seat distortion, volatility, and constituency similarity.

layers.name: Simulation
layers.description: What-if swing simulators (uniform, state-level, zero-sum) and seat flip projections.

layers.name: Visualization
layers.description: Builds visualizer data bundles and the static web UI (map, tables, DHS overlay).

layers.name: Shared Utilities
layers.description: Election metrics formulas and dataset validation helpers.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: README files and project guides describing pipeline usage and architecture.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README and PROJECT_GUIDE to understand the research pipeline goals and current project status.

tour.title: Configuration Hub
tour.description: src/config.py defines ACTIVE_YEAR, paths, and constants. src/data_io.py is the single I/O layer every module uses.

tour.title: Raw Data Cleaning
tour.description: ECI Excel files are cleaned into tidy CSVs via clean_eci.py and clean_eci_2019.py.

tour.title: Database Tables
tour.description: database_layer.py normalises cleaned CSVs into candidate, constituency, and alliance tables.

tour.title: Feature Building
tour.description: Winners, top-2, and constituency feature tables are derived for downstream analysis.

tour.title: Cross-Year Analysis
tour.description: compare_2019_2024.py is the main cross-election analysis entry point.

tour.title: Demographics Pipeline
tour.description: Census and DHS/NFHS microdata are cleaned and aggregated into state/district features.

tour.title: Swing Simulation
tour.description: Simulators apply party swings to project seat flips under what-if scenarios.

tour.title: Visualizer
tour.description: build_visualizer_data.py exports a JSON bundle consumed by the static visualizer UI.
